goal: has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), x0, f(x0) * dg + g(x0) * df)
has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), h), x0, pointwise_mul(f, g, x0) * dh + h(x0) * (f(x0) * dg + g(x0) * df))
has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](g, h), x0, g(x0) * dh + h(x0) * dg)
has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, pointwise_mul[Real, Real](g, h)), x0, f(x0) * (g(x0) * dh + h(x0) * dg) + pointwise_mul(g, h, x0) * df)
differentiable_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, g), h), x0)
differentiable_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, pointwise_mul[Real, Real](g, h)), x0)
has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, f), f), x0, pointwise_mul(f, f, x0) * d + f(x0) * (f(x0) * d + f(x0) * d))
differentiable_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, f), f), x0)
has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real]), x0, x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)
exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real]), x0, k0) }

p.c: function(x1: Real) { not has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real]), x0, x1) }(x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1)
exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real]), x0, k0) }
let w0: Real satisfy { has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real]), x0, w0) }
function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x2, k0) } = differentiable_at(x1, x2) }(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real]), x0)

not exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real]), x0, k0) } or differentiable_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real]), x0)

goal: has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real]), identity_fn[Real]), x0, pointwise_mul(identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real], x0) * Real.1 + x0 * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1))
exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real]), identity_fn[Real]), x0, k0) }

p.c: function(x1: Real) { not has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real]), identity_fn[Real]), x0, x1) }(pointwise_mul(identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real], x0) * Real.1 + x0 * (x0 * Real.1 + x0 * Real.1))
exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real]), identity_fn[Real]), x0, k0) }
let w0: Real satisfy { has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real]), identity_fn[Real]), x0, w0) }

function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x2, k0) } = differentiable_at(x1, x2) }(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](identity_fn[Real], identity_fn[Real]), identity_fn[Real]), x0)
